summary: Completed comprehensive backend authentication testing for Apple identity token verification enhancement. All 13 authentication flows tested successfully including Apple Sign-In with JWT verification, backward compatibility, and graceful degradation.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login with demo credentials (demo@familycareorganizer.com / Demo2026!) - returns token
POST /api/auth/login with empty body - returns 422 with clear error message
POST /api/auth/apple with new user and identity_token - creates user, token_verified=false for invalid token (graceful degradation)
POST /api/auth/apple without identity_token - backward compatible, works correctly
POST /api/auth/apple with returning user (same user_id) - returns existing user
POST /api/auth/apple with empty user_id - returns 400 error
GET /api/auth/me with valid token - returns user data
POST /api/auth/google with google_user_id and email - works correctly
